# Seats.ca

> Canada's no extra fees ticket platform

Seats.ca is Canada's first and only ticket marketplace that charges zero service fees, zero processing fees, and zero hidden costs. We connect fans directly with ticket sellers for live sporting events across Canada.

## About

Seats.ca was built to solve the problem of excessive hidden fees in the Canadian ticket industry. Major platforms charge 20-35% in service fees on top of the ticket price. Seats.ca eliminates all of those fees through an optional annual membership model ($49.95/year).

## Supported Leagues

- MLB (Major League Baseball) — Toronto Blue Jays
- NHL (National Hockey League) — All Canadian teams
- NBA (National Basketball Association) — Toronto Raptors
- NFL (National Football League)
- MLS (Major League Soccer) — All Canadian clubs
- CFL (Canadian Football League)
- WNBA (Women's National Basketball Association)

## How It Works

1. Browse games for your favourite team
2. Compare ticket listings at face value
3. Purchase with zero hidden fees (members)
4. Receive your tickets instantly

## Membership

- Annual membership: $49.95/year
- Members pay zero service fees on all ticket purchases
- Non-members pay a standard service fee at checkout

## Contact

- Email: info@seats.ca
- Website: https://seats.ca
